persona_set_note: md5 + lastUpdated of the canonical 22-…/persona-categories.json this asset was built against. The N38 count-triad assertion (qc-assert-repo-consistency.py:_persona_set_triad_failures) and persona-set-asset-consistency-guard.yml fail CI if blueprint dirs != categories keys != persona_count != canonical_persona_count. Rebuild incrementally via shared-utils/prebuilt-index/build-and-publish.sh (HASH-SKIP embeds only the delta) — NEVER a full re-embed.
section_tag_note: embeddings table carries section_number + mode columns. coaching rows at section_number=3, leadership/governance rows at section_number=4. mode values: {both, coaching, leadership}. Section-tagged rows allow mode-aware retrieval without a full re-index.

delta_provider_backstamp.status: PENDING — Ship must run build-and-publish.sh to produce the v2.2.1 asset
delta_provider_backstamp.defect: gemini-section-indexer.py INSERT omitted provider/model/dim columns. The 11 delta personas added to v2.2.0 arrived with provider=NULL, model=NULL, dim=NULL. init_db() backfill only fires when columns are absent — it never re-runs on existing NULL rows — so the prebuilt v2.2.0 asset shipped with 161 blank-provider rows across the 11 newest personas.
delta_provider_backstamp.fix: gemini-section-indexer.py INSERT now explicitly writes provider='gemini', model=GEMINI_MODEL, dim=GEMINI_OUTPUT_DIM on every row. build-and-publish.sh step 1.5 backstamps any remaining NULL rows after downloading the base asset (no re-embed: inferred from blob length 12288 bytes = 3072 dims * 4 bytes/float32). ensure_v2_1_schema() now adds provider/model/dim columns.
delta_provider_backstamp.verified: provider='gemini', model='gemini-embedding-2', dim=3072 confirmed on all 161 rows in operator local DB. get_db_index_provider() returns ('gemini', 'gemini-embedding-2') cleanly from all 4574 rows.

pr363_personas.note: All 10 PR-363 canonical personas are present in this v2.1.0 asset under their canonical slugs, section-tagged. The stale prebuilt-index-v2.0.0 predated these blueprints; v2.1.0 resolves the gap.

orphan_blueprints_shipped.note: All 3 orphan-blueprint personas are present in this v2.1.0 asset under their canonical slugs, section-tagged. They are fully operational for both Coaching Mode and Task/Agent-Governance mode.

notes: Canonical 54-persona section-tagged rebuild with GA gemini-embedding-2 @3072. 54 personas / 4413 chunks / 68 source files. All canonical slugs ship section-tagged: coaching rows at section_number=3, leadership/governance rows at section_number=4. Replaces prebuilt-index-v2.0.0 (48 personas, 7615 chunks, no section tags). Clients download this asset instead of re-embedding per box (saves Gemini API credits). Every vector is float32 @ dim 3072. SHA256 verified at build time and must be verified before install. ROHDE NOTE (open): rohde-the-sketchnote-workbook has a selector category-map gap (_CATEGORY_DOMAINS['design'] does not include visual-storytelling); fix deferred pending per-box index validation. v2.2.1 note: backstamp-only rebuild — no new vectors; all 161 blank-provider rows across 11 delta personas are stamped provider=gemini/model=gemini-embedding-2/dim=3072 from blob length. gemini-section-indexer.py INSERT fixed to write provider/model/dim on all future rows.
